description: The Molluso are a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Platì, Calabria, with a strong presence in Buccinasco, Lombardy. They have been active in Lombardy since the 1980s and are considered satellite affiliates of the powerful Barbaro-Papalia clans. The historical boss is Giosofatto Molluso. Members have been involved in cocaine trafficking with Turkey and Colombia, and more recently in illegal waste trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: vengono accusati di trafficare in cocaina con ... la Colombia
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Molluso trafficked cocaine with Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: vengono accusati di trafficare in cocaina con la Turchia
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Molluso trafficked cocaine with Turkey.
